reviews.comment:
Parada casi obligada de la hermosa ruta 25. Estuve en junio del 2019. Tuve que esperar media hora para cargar nafta, poco personal.

(Translated by Google)
A near-obligatory stop on the beautiful Route 25. I was there in June 2019. I had to wait half an hour to fill up with gas; there were few staff.

reviews.comment:
Solo hay señal de celular de Movistar, no hay remolque para auxilio mecánico. Estaba rota la máquina de agua caliente para mate, solo se cobraba en efectivo en el combustible porque no había señal para el posnet. Los baños estaban sucios. Los precios de los productos que vendían muy caros.
La atención del personal súper profesional.

(Translated by Google)
There's only Movistar cell phone service, and there's no tow truck for mechanical assistance. The hot water machine for mate was broken, and fuel was only charged in cash because there was no service for the POS network. The bathrooms were dirty. The prices of the products sold were very expensive.
The staff was extremely professional.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNLNnRlVEJREAE
